content:
flowchart LR
    subgraph concurrency["Spec: concurrency"]
        Q["queue_mod.rs\n4%"]
    end
    subgraph numeric["Spec: numeric"]
        S["statistics_mod.rs\n5%"]
        BI["bisect_mod.rs\n14%"]
    end
    subgraph text["Spec: text-processing"]
        SH["shlex_mod.rs\n7%"]
        L["locale_mod.rs\n10%"]
    end
    subgraph datetime["Spec: datetime"]
        C["calendar_mod.rs\n8%"]
    end
    subgraph archive["Spec: archive-and-compression"]
        LZ["lzma_mod.rs\n11%"]
        ZL["zlib_mod.rs\n11%"]
    end
    subgraph random["Spec: random"]
        SE["secrets_mod.rs\n12%"]
    end
    subgraph typing["Spec: typing-and-inspect"]
        AB["abc_mod.rs\n14%"]
    end
    Q & S & BI & SH & L & C & LZ & ZL & SE & AB --> T["stdlib_coverage_lower_tests.rs\nintegration tests"]
